links.description: As the app's icon.svg (likely used for favicon/PWA manifest), this image serves as the visual brand identity for the MitraTitip project.
Icon background <rect> is filled with #0f172a (dark navy/slate) and the monogram text is filled with #ffffff (white), on a 192x192 canvas with 32px corner radius (rounded-square app icon shape).
SVG contains a <text> element rendering the bold characters "MT" (font-size 80, weight 700, white fill) centered on the canvas.
The "MT" monogram plausibly stands for the initials of "MitraTitip" (Mitra Titip), the project/app name, functioning as its PWA/app icon logo.
File matches the standard Next.js logo SVG asset that 'create-next-app' places in the public/ directory by default, typically referenced from the app's footer or README as a static asset.

The SVG renders the official Next.js wordmark logotype (black text-based logo on transparent background, viewBox 0 0 394 80) using two solid black path shapes: the 'Next.js' text mark and an angled 'N' glyph mark.

links.note: File resides in the project's public static assets directory, indicating it is served as a static icon asset.

Filename and icon style match the default Next.js scaffold icon set (file.svg, globe.svg, window.svg) commonly used for links like Learn/Examples/Deploy on the starter home page, but no consuming code file was provided in this chunk to confirm actual usage in MitraTitip.
